name: Bark, Inc.
business: BARK, Inc. designs and develops proprietary dog toys, treats, and chews under the BarkBox and Super Chewer brands. It sells directly to consumers via subscription and through a network of retail partners and online marketplaces. It also offers a premium dog air travel service called BARK Air.
sellsTo: BARK Air (premium dog air travel service)

exposures.sentence: We leverage an ever-growing collection of first-party data, customer insights, and AI to deliver personalized products and experiences tailored to the needs of each and every dog we serve.
We are an omnichannel brand that designs and develops proprietary products for dogs across two key brands: BarkBox and Super Chewer.
Our mission is to make all dogs happy. We aspire to be the world's favorite dog brand.

tamClaims.claim: According to the APPA, annual spend on pets in the U.S. was approximately $158 billion in 2025, an increase of 3.7% compared to 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the American Pet Products Association (APPA), annual spend on pets in the U.S. was approximately $158 billion in 2025, an increase of 3.7%, compared to 2024.

tamClaims.claim: According to the APPA, dogs are the most popular pet in the U.S., with approximately 71 million households (53% of all U.S. households) having a dog.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the APPA, dogs are the most popular pet in the U.S., with approximately 71 million households--representing 53% of all U.S. households--having a dog as a member of their family.
